set -euo pipefail

statusUpdates=[{at:now,state:"queued",status:"pending",step:"accepted",details:{note:"marketing production job accepted"}},{at:now,state:"running",status:"in_progress",step:"production_orchestration_started",details:{strategy_input_keys:Object.keys(strategy)}}];const branches={"ad-designer":{state:"completed",status:"ready",source:"strategy_outputs",summary:"Ad concepts prepared from strategy outputs."},"scriptwriter":{state:"completed",status:"ready",source:"strategy_outputs",summary:"Scripts drafted from strategy outputs."},"page-designer":{state:"completed",status:"ready",source:"strategy_outputs",summary:"Landing page drafts prepared from strategy outputs."}};statusUpdates.push({at:now,state:"production_parallelized",status:"completed",step:"parallel_production",details:{branches:["ad-designer","scriptwriter","page-designer"]}});if(approvalRequired&&!approved){statusUpdates.push({at:now,state:"awaiting_approval",status:"blocked",step:"approval_checkpoint",details:{required:true,approved:false}});}else{statusUpdates.push({at:now,state:"publishing",status:"ready",step:"approval_checkpoint",details:{required:approvalRequired,approved:true}});}const doc={schema_name:"job_runtime_state_schema",schema_version:"1.0.0",job_id:jobId,job_type:jobType,tenant_id:tenantId,state:approvalRequired&&!approved?"awaiting_approval":"publishing",status:approvalRequired&&!approved?"blocked":"in_progress",attempt:1,max_attempts:3,inputs:{request:req,strategy_outputs:strategy},production:{parallel_branches:branches},approval:{required:approvalRequired,approved},status_updates:statusUpdates,history:statusUpdates,created_at:now,updated_at:now};fs.writeFileSync(outPath,JSON.stringify(doc,null,2));process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:"accepted",tenant_id:tenantId,job_type:jobType,job_id:jobId,job_state:doc.state,approval_required:approvalRequired&&!approved,published:false,repair_attempted:false,job_runtime_path:outPath,status_updates:statusUpdates}));' "$NOW" "$JOB_ID" "$TENANT_ID" "$JOB_TYPE" "$REQUEST_JSON" "$OUT_PATH"

set -euo pipefail
CREATE_STDOUT='{{$node["Create Production Job"].json.stdout}}'
REQUEST_JSON='{{$node["Normalize Input"].json.request_json}}'
NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const base=JSON.parse(process.argv[1]);const req=JSON.parse(process.argv[2]||"{}");const now=process.argv[3];const path=base.job_runtime_path;const doc=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path,"utf8"));const maxAttempts=3;let repairAttempted=false;let published=true;let publishError=null;const shouldFail=!!req.simulate_publish_failure;doc.status_updates.push({at:now,state:"publishing",status:"in_progress",step:"publish_attempt_1",details:{attempt:1}});if(shouldFail){published=false;publishError="simulated_publish_failure";doc.status_updates.push({at:now,state:"publishing",status:"failed",step:"publish_attempt_1",details:{error:publishError}});}if(!published){const repair=((req.repair||{}).enabled)!==false;if(repair&&doc.attempt<maxAttempts){repairAttempted=true;doc.attempt=doc.attempt+1;doc.status_updates.push({at:now,state:"repair_running",status:"in_progress",step:"bounded_repair",details:{attempt:doc.attempt,max_attempts:maxAttempts,reason:publishError}});doc.status_updates.push({at:now,state:"publishing",status:"in_progress",step:"publish_attempt_2",details:{attempt:2}});published=true;doc.status_updates.push({at:now,state:"completed",status:"success",step:"publish_completed_after_repair",details:{repair_attempted:true}});}else{doc.state="failed";doc.status="failed";doc.status_updates.push({at:now,state:"failed",status:"failed",step:"publish_failed_no_repair",details:{reason:publishError}});}}if(published){doc.state="completed";doc.status="success";}doc.updated_at=now;doc.history=doc.status_updates;fs.writeFileSync(path,JSON.stringify(doc,null,2));process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:doc.state==="failed"?"failed":"completed",tenant_id:doc.tenant_id,job_type:doc.job_type,job_id:doc.job_id,job_state:doc.state,approval_required:false,published:published,repair_attempted:repairAttempted,job_runtime_path:path,status_updates:doc.status_updates}));' "$CREATE_STDOUT" "$REQUEST_JSON" "$NOW"

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { tenant_id: $json.tenant_id, job_id: $json.job_id, job_runtime_path: $json.job_runtime_path, failed_stage: $json.failed_stage, defect_report: $json.defect_report, attempt: $json.attempt, request: JSON.parse($json.request_json || '{}') } }}

parameters.command:
set -euo pipefail
ROOT="{{$env.PROJECT_ROOT || '/data/aries-platform-bootstrap'}}"
JOB_ID="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.job_id}}"
TENANT_ID="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_id}}"
APPROVAL='{{JSON.stringify($node["Normalize Input"].json.approval)}}'
RESUME_PUBLISH='{{$node["Normalize Input"].json.resume_publish_if_needed}}'
JOB_PATH="$ROOT/generated/draft/marketing-jobs/${JOB_ID}.json"
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=process.argv;const now=new Date().toISOString();const jobPath=p[1];const tenantInput=p[2]||'';const approval=JSON.parse(p[3]||'{}');const resumePublish=String(p[4]).toLowerCase()==='true';const stageOrder=['research','strategy','production','publish'];const validStageStates=new Set(['pending','queued','running','paused','waiting_approval','blocked','completed','failed','skipped']);if(!fs.existsSync(jobPath)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:'error',reason:'job_not_found',code:'missing_job_runtime',http_code:404,details:{job_runtime_path:jobPath}}));process.exit(0);}const raw=fs.readFileSync(jobPath,'utf8');let job;try{job=JSON.parse(raw);}catch(e){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:'hard_failure',reason:'invalid_job_runtime_json',code:'job_runtime_parse_failed',http_code:500,details:{job_runtime_path:jobPath,message:e.message}}));process.exit(0);}const decision=String(approval.decision||'').toLowerCase();if(decision!=='approved'){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:'rejected',reason:'approval_not_granted',code:'decision_not_approved',http_code:409,job_id:job.job_id||null,tenant_id:job.tenant_id||tenantInput||null,details:{decision}}));process.exit(0);}if(typeof job.outputs!=='object'||job.outputs===null)job.outputs={};if(typeof job.outputs.stage_status!=='object'||job.outputs.stage_status===null)job.outputs.stage_status={};const stageStatus=job.outputs.stage_status;const transitions=[];const resumed=[];const skipped=[];const repairs=[];const approvedStages=Array.isArray(approval.approved_stages)?approval.approved_stages.map(s=>String(s).toLowerCase()):[];const approvedAll=approvedStages.length===0;const isApproved=(s)=>approvedAll||approvedStages.includes(s);for(const stage of stageOrder){const current=stageStatus[stage];if(typeof current==='undefined'){stageStatus[stage]='paused';repairs.push({stage,repair:'initialize_missing_stage_status',from:null,to:'paused'});}else if(typeof current!=='string'||!validStageStates.has(current)){const prev=typeof current==='string'?current:JSON.stringify(current);stageStatus[stage]='paused';repairs.push({stage,repair:'coerce_invalid_stage_status',from:prev,to:'paused'});} }for(const stage of stageOrder){const from=stageStatus[stage];if((from==='paused'||from==='waiting_approval'||from==='blocked')&&isApproved(stage)){stageStatus[stage]='queued';transitions.push({stage,from,to:'queued',reason:'approval_granted'});resumed.push(stage);}else{skipped.push({stage,status:from,reason:isApproved(stage)?'not_paused':'not_in_approved_stages'});} }const priorDone=stageOrder.slice(0,3).every(s=>stageStatus[s]==='completed'||stageStatus[s]==='queued'||stageStatus[s]==='running');if(resumePublish&&priorDone&&stageStatus.publish==='pending'){stageStatus.publish='queued';transitions.push({stage:'publish',from:'pending',to:'queued',reason:'resume_publish_if_needed'});if(!resumed.includes('publish'))resumed.push('publish');}if(!Array.isArray(job.history))job.history=[];job.state='running';job.status='running';job.updated_at=now;job.outputs.approval_resume={decision:'approved',approved_by:approval.approved_by||'unknown',approved_at:approval.approved_at||now,resume_publish_if_needed:resumePublish,resumed_stages:resumed,skipped_stages:skipped,stage_transitions:transitions,repairs};job.history.push({at:now,state:'running',status:'running',note:`approval resume applied; resumed=${resumed.join(',')||'none'}`});if(tenantInput&&job.tenant_id&&tenantInput!==job.tenant_id){repairs.push({scope:'tenant_id',repair:'input_tenant_mismatch_ignored',input_tenant_id:tenantInput,job_tenant_id:job.tenant_id});}fs.writeFileSync(jobPath,JSON.stringify(job,null,2));process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:'resumed',job_id:job.job_id||null,tenant_id:job.tenant_id||tenantInput||null,decision:'approved',resumed_stages:resumed,stage_transitions:transitions,repairs,job_runtime_path:jobPath,http_code:200}));" "$JOB_PATH" "$TENANT_ID" "$APPROVAL" "$RESUME_PUBLISH"
